en: The word of the LORD came to me:
zh: 耶和華的話臨到我說：

en: "Son of man, speak to your people and say to them, If I bring the sword upon a land, and the people of the land take a man from among them, and make him their watchman,
zh: “人子啊！你要告訴你本國的人，說：‘我使刀劍臨到一地，那地的人民從他們中間選出一個人，作他們的守望者；

en: and if he sees the sword coming upon the land and blows the trumpet and warns the people,
zh: 這人見刀劍臨到那地，就吹響號角，警告眾人；

en: then if anyone who hears the sound of the trumpet does not take warning, and the sword comes and takes him away, his blood shall be upon his own head.
zh: 凡聽見號角聲而不接受警告的，刀劍若來把他除滅，他的罪 就要歸到自己的頭上；

en: He heard the sound of the trumpet and did not take warning; his blood shall be upon himself. But if he had taken warning, he would have saved his life.
zh: 他既然聽見號角聲而不接受警告，所以他的罪 要歸到自己的身上；他若接受警告，就可以救回自己的性命了。

en: But if the watchman sees the sword coming and does not blow the trumpet, so that the people are not warned, and the sword comes and takes any one of them, that person is taken away in his iniquity, but his blood I will require at the watchman's hand.
zh: 但是，那守望的人若見刀劍臨到，卻不吹響號角，以致人民沒有受到警告，刀劍來把他們中間的一個人除滅；那人雖然因自己的罪孽被除滅，我卻要因他的死追究守望的人。’

en: "So you, son of man, I have made a watchman for the house of Israel. Whenever you hear a word from my mouth, you shall give them warning from me.
zh: “人子啊！我立了你作以色列家守望的人，所以你要聆聽我口中的話，替我警告他們。

en: If I say to the wicked, O wicked one, you shall surely die, and you do not speak to warn the wicked to turn from his way, that wicked person shall die in his iniquity, but his blood I will require at your hand.
zh: 如果我對惡人說：‘惡人啊，你必定死亡！’你以西結卻不出聲警告惡人離開他所行的，這惡人就必因自己的罪孽死亡，我卻要因他的死追究你。

en: But if you warn the wicked to turn from his way, and he does not turn from his way, that person shall die in his iniquity, but you will have delivered your soul.
zh: 如果你警告惡人，叫他離開他所行的，他仍不轉離，他就必因自己的罪孽死亡，你卻救了自己的性命。

en: "And you, son of man, say to the house of Israel, Thus have you said: 'Surely our transgressions and our sins are upon us, and we rot away because of them. How then can we live?'
zh: “人子啊！你要對以色列家說：‘你們這樣說：我們的過犯和罪惡常在我們身上；我們必因此衰弱而死，怎能存活呢？’

en: Say to them, As I live, declares the Lord GOD, I have no pleasure in the death of the wicked, but that the wicked turn from his way and live; turn back, turn back from your evil ways, for why will you die, O house of Israel?
zh: 你要對他們說：‘主耶和華這樣宣告：我指著我的永生起誓，我絕不喜悅惡人死亡，卻喜悅惡人離開他所行的，得以存活。以色列家啊，回轉吧！離開你們所行的，何必死亡呢？’

en: "And you, son of man, say to your people, The righteousness of the righteous shall not deliver him when he transgresses, and as for the wickedness of the wicked, he shall not fall by it when he turns from his wickedness, and the righteous shall not be able to live by his righteousness when he sins.
zh: 人子啊！你要對你本國的人說：‘義人的義在他犯罪的日子，不能救他；惡人的惡在他離開惡行的日子，也不會絆倒他；義人在他犯罪的日子，也不能因他的義存活。’

en: Though I say to the righteous that he shall surely live, yet if he trusts in his righteousness and does injustice, none of his righteous deeds shall be remembered, but in his injustice that he has done he shall die.
zh: 我雖然對義人說他必定生存，但是他若恃著自己的義而行惡，他的一切義都必不被記念；他必因所行的惡死亡。

en: Again, though I say to the wicked, 'You shall surely die,' yet if he turns from his sin and does what is just and right,
zh: 我雖然對惡人說：‘你必定死亡’，但是他若離開他的罪，行公平和正直的事，

en: if the wicked restores the pledge, gives back what he has taken by robbery, and walks in the statutes of life, not doing injustice, he shall surely live; he shall not die.
zh: 把抵押歸還，把搶奪人的物件償還，遵行賜生命的律例，不作惡事，他就必存活，不致死亡；

en: None of the sins that he has committed shall be remembered against him. He has done what is just and right; he shall surely live.
zh: 他所犯的一切罪，必不被記念；他行了公平和正直的事，就必存活。

en: "Yet your people say, 'The way of the Lord is not just,' when it is their own way that is not just.
zh: “你本國的人還說：‘主所行的不公平。’其實他們所行的才是不公平。

en: When the righteous turns from his righteousness and does injustice, he shall die for it.
zh: 義人若離開他的義，去行惡事，他就必因此死亡；

en: And when the wicked turns from his wickedness and does what is just and right, he shall live by them.
zh: 惡人若離開他的惡，去行公平和正直的事，他就必因此存活。

en: Yet you say, 'The way of the Lord is not just.' O house of Israel, I will judge each of you according to his ways."
zh: 你們還說：‘主所行的不公平。’以色列家啊！我必照著你們各人所行的審判你們。”

en: In the twelfth year of our exile, in the tenth month, on the fifth day of the month, a fugitive from Jerusalem came to me and said, "The city has been struck down."
zh: 在我們被擄以後的第十二年十月初五日，有人從耶路撒冷逃到我這裡來，說：“城已經被攻陷了。”

en: Now the hand of the LORD had been upon me the evening before the fugitive came; and he had opened my mouth by the time the man came to me in the morning, so my mouth was opened, and I was no longer mute.
zh: 那人來到的前一天晚上，耶和華的手按在我身上，開了我的口。到了早晨，那人來到我這裡，我的口已經開了，不再作啞巴。

en: The word of the LORD came to me:
zh: 耶和華的話臨到我說：

en: "Son of man, the inhabitants of these waste places in the land of Israel keep saying, 'Abraham was only one man, yet he got possession of the land; but we are many; the land is surely given us to possess.'
zh: “人子啊！那些住在以色列地廢墟裡的人常說：‘亞伯拉罕一個人就得了這地為業；我們人數眾多，這地更應該給我們為業。’

en: Therefore say to them, Thus says the Lord GOD: You eat flesh with the blood and lift up your eyes to your idols and shed blood; shall you then possess the land?
zh: 因此，你要對他們說：‘主耶和華這樣說：你們吃帶血的祭肉，舉目仰望你們的偶像，並且流人的血，你們還可以得這地為業嗎？

en: You rely on the sword, you commit abominations, and each of you defiles his neighbor's wife; shall you then possess the land?
zh: 你們倚仗自己的刀劍，行可憎惡的事，人人玷污鄰舍的妻子，你們還可以得這地為業嗎？’

en: Say this to them, Thus says the Lord GOD: As I live, surely those who are in the waste places shall fall by the sword, and whoever is in the open field I will give to the beasts to be devoured, and those who are in strongholds and in caves shall die by pestilence.
zh: 你要對他們這樣說：‘主耶和華這樣說：我指著我的永生起誓，那些在廢墟裡的，必倒在刀下；在田間的，我必交給野獸吞吃；在堡壘和山洞裡的，必因瘟疫而死。

en: And I will make the land a desolation and a waste, and her proud might shall come to an end, and the mountains of Israel shall be so desolate that none will pass through.
zh: 我必使這地非常荒涼，它因勢力而有的驕傲必止息；以色列的山都必荒涼，無人經過。

en: Then they will know that I am the LORD, when I have made the land a desolation and a waste because of all their abominations that they have committed.
zh: 我必因他們所行一切可憎惡的事，使這地非常荒涼，那時他們就知道我是耶和華。’

en: "As for you, son of man, your people who talk together about you by the walls and at the doors of the houses, say to one another, each to his brother, 'Come, and hear what the word is that comes from the LORD.'
zh: “人子啊！你本國的人在城牆旁邊和各家的門口正在談論你；弟兄對弟兄彼此說：‘來吧！聽聽有甚麼話從耶和華那裡出來。’

en: And they come to you as people come, and they sit before you as my people, and they hear what you say but they will not do it; for with lustful talk in their mouths they act; their heart is set on their gain.
zh: 他們成群來到你那裡，坐在你面前，像是我的子民一樣。其實他們聽了你的話，卻不去行；他們只是用口表示愛慕，他們的心卻是追隨不義之財。

en: And behold, you are to them like one who sings lustful songs with a beautiful voice and plays well on an instrument, for they hear what you say, but they will not do it.
zh: 在他們眼中，你不過是首情歌，唱得美妙，彈得悅耳，他們聽了你的話，卻不去行。

en: When this comes- and come it will!- then they will know that a prophet has been among them."
zh: 看哪！這事必定應驗，到那時候，他們就知道在他們中間有先知了。”
